name: JH Electric
seoDescription: JH Electric — Sonoma native Javier Hernandez has run his own licensed electrical business in Sonoma, CA since 2003, handling residential and commercial wiring

sections.heading: Sonoma's owner-run electrician since 2003
sections.subheading: JH Electric is Javier Hernandez's Sonoma electrical business — a Sonoma native who has worked in the trade since 1996 and gone out on his own since 2003, handling residential and commercial wiring
badges: Owner-operated by Sonoma native Javier Hernandez

sections.heading: About JH Electric
body: JH Electric is owned and operated by Javier Hernandez, a Sonoma native who began working in the electrical field in 1996 and started his own business in 2003. Based in Sonoma, he serves homeowners and businesses around the Sonoma Valley.

JH Electric focuses on residential and commercial electrical work for both new construction and remodels, specializing in troubleshooting, re-wiring and panel upgrades. The business is a licensed C-10 electrical contractor, California contractor's license #816936.
highlights: Owner-operated by Sonoma native Javier Hernandez

items.title: Panel Upgrades
items.description: Upgrading and replacing electrical panels to safely handle modern household and business loads.

items.title: Wiring & Re-Wiring
items.description: New wiring and re-wires for remodels, additions and new construction, residential or commercial.

items.title: Troubleshooting & Repair
items.description: Diagnosing and fixing electrical problems, faults and code issues throughout your property.

items.title: New Construction & Remodels
items.description: Complete electrical for remodels and new builds, handled by the owner himself.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message JH Electric and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: Work with JH Electric
sections.body: Find us at 104 El Portola Dr. Call (707) 935-2800 — we’re glad to help.
